MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Meridian Management Group is present. Represented by Anthony Perez.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brian Devantier is present.
Attorney Rob Peterson representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem William Rauch, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of FEB-27-2012 is vacated.
